summary: Implement the rust-diffforge Audio tab with a local Whisper model/runtime installer, a global-shortcut recorder widget, low-power buffered capture, VAD-gated local transcription, and focused text insertion.

review_items.summary: The Audio workspace view becomes a functional local dictation setup surface that reports Whisper model and runtime state, downloads the selected ggml base.en model, installs the packaged Windows whisper.cpp runtime when supported, detects compatible PATH/homebrew Linux and macOS runtimes, and can open the recorder widget after install.

The Tauri host downloads the Whisper model into app data, validates model/runtime hashes after download, resolves a local whisper.cpp CLI runtime per platform, transcribes short VAD-filtered WAV microphone captures locally, and never sends captured audio to the hosted API.

A separate hidden audio-widget window is created on demand, shown without taking focus when the local Whisper model and runtime are available, and automatically arms recording from the global shortcut.
A global CommandOrControl+Shift+Space shortcut toggles the recorder widget; if Whisper is not installed the widget is not shown.

After transcription the widget hides and the Tauri host attempts to insert the transcript into the prior operating-system text target using Windows SendInput, macOS osascript/System Events, or Linux xdotool/wtype/wl-copy/xclip fallbacks.

The widget keeps a low-power microphone graph warm while visible, continuously updates a small PCM ring buffer, discards old frames when idle, and uses client-side VAD to keep pre-roll without invoking Whisper until the user finishes a speech segment.
The widget filters buffered audio with simple RMS/peak/silence VAD before sending a bounded WAV to the local Tauri transcription command, preventing silent clips from waking Whisper.

Microphone audio is captured in the widget while the widget is visible, held only in memory in a bounded rolling buffer, trimmed by VAD, encoded to short WAV payloads, sent only to the local Tauri command boundary, and bounded by size and duration limits before local transcription.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or hosted API data access change is required.

patches.summary: Replace the Audio placeholder with model installer controls and add the audio-widget recorder route.
Add model download/status, local Whisper transcription, widget window, global shortcut, and focused text insertion commands.
Add local audio transcription and shortcut dependencies.
Allow the main and audio-widget windows to use the shared default capability.
Allow microphone/media capture needed by the recorder widget WebView.
Add the macOS microphone usage string required for packaged microphone access.

compatibility.notes: The feature is local to the desktop app. It adds optional model files under app data and does not alter auth, billing, hosted API, or shared database contracts.

data_handling.stores_audio_recordings: temporary WAV files are created only for local whisper.cpp CLI execution and removed immediately after transcription
data_handling.model_storage: The selected ggml Whisper model is downloaded to the Tauri app data directory.

tests.summary: Validate Tauri commands and local Whisper host code.
